name: security.certificate.list
title: Status Security Certificate List
description: A status report of the client's managed certificates.

payloadkeys.title: Status item value.
payloadkeys.content: A list of the device's managed certificates.

subkeys.content: A status report of a security certificate.

subkeys.title: Unique identifier of the certificate.
subkeys.content: The unique identifier of the certificate which the system uses as the primary key.

subkeys.title: Indicates removal of the certificate.
subkeys.content: If `true`, the system removed the app and only this key and the `identifier` key are present in the status item object.

subkeys.title: Asset declaration identifier.
subkeys.content: The identifier of the asset declaration that installed the certificate, which is only present if a declaration installed the certificate.

subkeys.title: Subject summary
subkeys.content: The summary of the certificate's subject.

subkeys.title: Is Identity
subkeys.content: If `true`, the certificate is an identity certificate.

subkeys.title: Certificate Data
subkeys.content: The certificate data in DER-encoded X.509 format.
